statement.p:
Consider the graph of the equation y={\left(x-70\right)^{2}-55.3}\text{.} Compared to the graph of y=x^2\text{,} the vertex has been shifted units
?
left
right and units
?
down
up .

solution.p: Since the vertex is (70,-55.3)\text{,} the graph is the graph of y=x^2 shifted 70 units right and 55.3 units down.
